longevity_evidence: Founded 1978 (47 years operating) - strong evidence of continuity through website and client relationships
customer_trust_evidence: 98% customer satisfaction claim, 500+ employees, 100+ distributors, UN/British Army/Unilever contracts as proxy for institutional trust
operational_footprint_evidence: Single facility with 500+ employees, 14 temperature-controlled chambers, multi-brand portfolio, FSSC 22000 certification
growth_signals_evidence: Expanded from cannery to multi-brand food processing, distribution across 15+ countries, value-added services (blast freezing, packhouse)
ecosystem_invisibility_evidence: No VC funding found, no TechCabal/Startup media features, no accelerator mentions, focused on operational excellence in food processing
next_steps: Awaiting full ecosystem invisibility verification - check LinkedIn presence and startup media mentions

growth_signals_evidence: Distribution center expansion to Eldoret (2014), maintained market position for decades
ecosystem_invisibility_evidence: No VC funding found, family business, traditional bakery focus, no startup ecosystem presence identified
